text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
1 
BELOW_BENCHMARK 
LABEL: 
Part D Plan Offered Below Benchmark 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the plan benefit package is a stand-alone Prescription Drug Plan (PDP) that offers a 
basic benefit with a premium below the regional benchmark or de minimis amount. A beneficiary with 
a full (100%) low-income premium subsidy (LIPS) would pay no premium for this plan. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG
